ri_ssh_instances_actions_desc: Connect, inspect logs, and manage this instance.
ri_ssh_instances_bind_host_hint: Network interface for the main local URL. Use 127.0.0.1/localhost for local-only access.
ri_ssh_instances_binding_local_forwards_: Binding local forwards to 0.0.0 makes the forwarded port reachable from other devices on your network. Continue?
ri_ssh_instances_desc_authentication: Optional credentials for SSH and remote UI.
ri_ssh_instances_desc_main_tunnel: Primary local URL that points to the remote OpenChamber server.
ri_ssh_instances_desc_port_forwards: Optional extra SSH forwards in addition to the primary OpenChamber tunnel.
ri_ssh_instances_desc_remote_server: How OpenChamber is discovered or started on the remote machine.
ri_ssh_instances_forward_type_hint: Local (-L): laptop -> remote service. Remote (-R): remote machine -> this laptop. Dynamic (-D): local SOCKS5 proxy.
ri_ssh_instances_install_method_hint: How OpenChamber gets installed/updated remotely when mode is Managed.
ri_ssh_instances_keep_server_running_hin: If enabled, OpenChamber daemon is left running remotely when you disconnect.
ri_ssh_instances_local_listen_hint: Local host and port where this forward listens on your machine.
ri_ssh_instances_local_listen_hint_alt: Local host and port where this forward listens on your machine.
ri_ssh_instances_local_port_in_use: Local port is already in use. Pick a random free local port and retry?
ri_ssh_instances_local_target_hint: Local host and port on your machine that receives traffic from remote -R listener.
ri_ssh_instances_local_url_not_available: Instance URL is not available yet
ri_ssh_instances_mode_hint: Managed installs/updates and starts OpenChamber remotely. External assumes it is already running.
ri_ssh_instances_oc_password_store_confi: Store OpenChamber UI password in settings.json as plaintext?
ri_ssh_instances_preferred_local_port_hi: Preferred local port for the main OpenChamber tunnel. Leave empty for auto-select.
ri_ssh_instances_preferred_remote_port_h: Port OpenChamber should use on the remote host. Leave empty to let the runtime choose.
ri_ssh_instances_remote_forward_type_dyn: Dynamic (-D): create a local SOCKS5 proxy on this laptop (for apps that support SOCKS proxy settings).
ri_ssh_instances_remote_forward_type_loc: Local (-L): open a port on this laptop and send it to a remote host:port over SSH (use this to access remote services locally).
ri_ssh_instances_remote_forward_type_rem: Remote (-R): expose a port on the remote machine and send that traffic back to this laptop.
ri_ssh_instances_remote_listen_hint: Remote host and port where SSH creates the -R listener.
ri_ssh_instances_remote_listen_hint_alt: Remote host and port where SSH creates the -R listener.
ri_ssh_instances_remote_target_hint: Remote host and port that receives traffic from local -L listener.
ri_ssh_instances_retried_random_port: Retried with a random local port
ri_ssh_instances_select_instance: Select an instance from the sidebar or import one from SSH config.
ri_ssh_instances_ssh_password_store_conf: Store SSH password in settings.json as plaintext?
ri_ssh_instances_store_password_confirm: Store password in settings.json as plaintext?
ri_ssh_instances_store_ssh_password: Store SSH password in settings.json as plaintext?
ri_ssh_instances_value_hint: Local (-L): laptop -> remote service. Remote (-R): remote machine -> this laptop. Dynamic (-D): local SOCKS5 proxy.
right_sidebar_resize_panel: Thay đổi kích thước bảng bên phải
sc_add_catalog_desc: Thêm kho Git làm nguồn thư mục mới. OpenChamber sẽ quét các thư mục chứa SKILL.md.

sc_configure_identities_hint: Cấu hình identities trong Cài đặt - Git Identities.
sc_configure_identities_hint2: Cấu hình identities trong Cài đặt → Git Identities.
sc_conflicts_desc: Một số kỹ năng đã chọn đã được cài đặt trong phạm vi này. Chọn bỏ qua hoặc ghi đè.
sc_install_from_repo_desc: Quét kho để tìm thư mục chứa SKILL.md, sau đó cài đặt các kỹ năng đã chọn.

sc_no_skills_found_hint: Thử tìm kiếm khác hoặc làm mới thư mục

sc_remove_catalog_confirm: Bạn có chắc muốn xóa thư mục này?

sc_scan_to_discover: Quét kho để phát hiện kỹ năng
sc_subpath_shorthand_hint: Với GitHub shorthand, bạn có thể thêm đường dẫn con như owner/repo/skills.
sc_toast_already_exists: Thư mục này đã tồn tại
sc_toast_auth_required_install: Yêu cầu xác thực. Chọn Git identity và thử cài đặt lại.
sc_toast_auth_required_scan: Yêu cầu xác thực. Chọn Git identity và quét lại.

tunnel_config_empty: When empty, cloudflared uses its default config (~/.cloudflared/config.yml).
tunnel_config_extension_error: Config file must use .yml, .yaml, or .json extension.
tunnel_connect_link_policy: Connect links are one-time and are revoked when tunnel stops or Connect link TTL expired.
tunnel_connect_qr_alt: Mã QR kết nối đường hầm
tunnel_description: Configure secure remote access with quick links or your own managed remote Cloudflare tunnel.
tunnel_install_hint: Install it to enable remote tunnel access:
tunnel_managed_local_docs: Check the documentation on managed local tunnel configuration
tunnel_managed_remote_docs: Check the documentation on how to configure a managed remote tunnel
tunnel_managed_remote_requires_domain: Managed remote tunnels require a bought domain in your Cloudflare account.
tunnel_managed_remote_token_info: Thông tin token từ xa được quản lý
tunnel_mode_managed_local_tooltip: Managed Local uses your local cloudflared configuration file.
tunnel_mode_managed_remote_tooltip: Managed Remote uses your Cloudflare account and hostname for long-lived access.
tunnel_mode_quick_tooltip: Quick Tunnel is best effort and Cloudflare does not guarantee uptime.
tunnel_no_saved_tunnels: No managed remote tunnels saved yet.
tunnel_public_url_hint: Public URL (Not accessible without a token)
tunnel_quick_alternative: For more reliable long-lived access, switch to Managed Remote or Managed Local tunnel mode.
tunnel_quick_warning: Quick Tunnel is best effort and Cloudflare does not guarantee uptime.
tunnel_replace_warning: Starting this tunnel replaces the active tunnel and revokes existing connect links and remote sessions.
tunnel_scan_qr: Scan with your phone to connect
tunnel_server_enforced: Secure Tunnel access is enforced server-side.
tunnel_start_hint: Start a {mode} tunnel and generate a one-time connect link. Do not close the app while this tunnel is in use.
tunnel_toast_hostname_required: Managed remote tunnel hostname is required
tunnel_toast_no_public_url: Tunnel started but no public URL was returned
tunnel_toast_replaced: Replaced previous tunnel: revoked {links} link(s), invalidated {sessions} session(s).
tunnel_toast_save_selected_failed: Failed to save selected managed remote tunnel
tunnel_toast_select_tunnel_first: Select or add a managed remote tunnel first
tunnel_toast_token_required: Managed remote tunnel token is required
tunnel_toast_token_required_before_start: Add a managed remote tunnel token before starting
tunnel_toast_token_save_failed: Failed to save managed remote tunnel token
tunnel_toast_ttl_save_failed: Failed to save tunnel TTL settings
tunnel_tokens_saved_hint: Tokens are saved per tunnel and reused from disk
